creator: jay.krell@cornell.edu
text:
Every time I do a clean FreeBSD 3.3 install from the CD, I get an error message that the "local" package didn't install. Everything seems to work fine though. Is this because I didn't setup much/enough network stuff?

How-To-Repeat: Do a clean install of FreeBSD 3.3 from the CD; that's about it; I get this error every time, but everything seems ok.
